mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(cat_no, cat_code, cat_name, cat_type, seqno, visible) VALUES(category_seq.nextval, #{cat_code}, #{cat_name}, #{cat_type}, #{seqno}, #{visible})
mapper.select: SELECT cat_no, cat_code, cat_name, cat_type, seqno, visible FROM category ORDER BY seqno ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET cat_code=#{cat_code}, cat_name=#{cat_name}, cat_type=#{cat_type}, seqno=#{seqno}, visible=#{visible} WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no}
UPDATE category SET seqno = seqno - 1 WHERE cat_no = #{cat_no}
UPDATE category SET seqno = seqno + 1 WHERE cat_no = #{cat_no}
UPDATE category SET visible='Y' WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no}
UPDATE category SET visible='N' WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no}
mapper.select: SELECT cat_no, cat_code, cat_name, cat_type, seqno, visible FROM category WHERE visible='Y' ORDER BY seqno ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contents WHERE cat_no = #{cat_no}

SELECT cat_no, cat_code, cat_name, cat_type, seqno, visible FROM category
WHERE UPPER(cat_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(cat_type) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(cat_code) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
ORDER BY seqno ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM category
WHERE UPPER(cat_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(cat_type) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(cat_code) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
SELECT cat_no, cat_code, cat_type, cat_name, seqno, visible FROM category WHERE cat_type = #{cat_type} AND visible = 'Y' ORDER BY seqno ASC
SELECT DISTINCT cat_type FROM category ORDER BY cat_type ASC
